case_title: LILIA A GONZALEZ VS. HECTOR E ACOSTA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-31-2013 - JUDGMENT.
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF DEC-19-2013 IS CONTINUED STIPULATION OF THE PARTIES FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO FEB-10-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN MATEO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, LILIA A AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, HECTOR E

SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF JUL-17-2014 IS CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO DEC-04-2014 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. CREDITOR WILL FILE A SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AFTER RECEIVING LAST PAYMENT IN NOVEMBER, 2014 FROM THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: DEC-05-2013 (FEE FOR SERVICE $59.00) AS TO DEFENDANT ACOSTA, HECTOR E

THE CLAIM OF EXEMPTION SET FOR APR-17-2014 IS DENIED. "THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-31-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-31-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GONZALEZ, LILIA A RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACOSTA, HECTOR E $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,550.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
